summary: Comprehensive testing of authentication features completed. All 21 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed. Features verified: Login, Signup, Password reset via DOB, Set password for Google users, Change password, /auth/me needs_password_setup flag, Student Performance Indicator, and Teacher role restriction.

minor.issue: Console warning about duplicate keys in React (2025-12 key) - minor React issue, not blocking

issues: Minor: Password field placeholder could be more descriptive

critical_code_review_comments: pwd_context is now properly imported and used for password hashing (line 22 in server.py)
SetPasswordDialog component properly handles Google users who need to set password
ChangePasswordForm correctly handles both users with existing password and those without
Teacher role restriction properly checks for TEACHER_CREATOR_EMAIL (m0m0077@hotmail.com)

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI elements verified, login/signup/logout flows working

seed_data_creation: Multiple test users created during pytest execution (cleaned up automatically)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth features fully tested. All endpoints working: /auth/signup, /auth/login, /auth/logout, /auth/me (with needs_password_setup flag), /auth/set-password, /auth/change-password, /auth/verify-dob, /auth/reset-password-dob, /users/date-of-birth, /students/my-performance. Teacher restriction at /users/role/teacher working correctly. SetPasswordDialog shows for Google users without password.

signup_flow.details: New users can sign up with email/password, weak passwords rejected, duplicate emails rejected

login_flow.details: Login works with correct credentials, invalid credentials rejected

auth_me_endpoint.details: /auth/me returns user info with needs_password_setup flag

password_reset_via_dob.details: verify-dob and reset-password-dob endpoints work correctly

set_password_for_google_users.details: /auth/set-password correctly handles users without existing password

change_password.details: Password change works with correct current password, wrong password rejected

student_performance_indicator.details: /students/my-performance returns score, level, breakdown, and stats

teacher_role_restriction.details: Only m0m0077@hotmail.com can create teacher accounts (403 for others)

frontend_ui.details: Login page, signup form, student dashboard, profile page all render correctly with proper elements

frontend_tests.login_page: PASSED - All elements present (email, password, submit, Google login, toggle mode)
frontend_tests.signup_form: PASSED - Name, confirm password fields visible in signup mode
frontend_tests.student_dashboard: PASSED - Performance indicator, stats cards, browse teachers button all visible
frontend_tests.profile_page: PASSED - Profile form card, change password form, date of birth manager visible
frontend_tests.forgot_password_dialog: PASSED - Shows email and DOB fields for password reset
frontend_tests.navigation: PASSED - Login to dashboard redirect working, logout redirect working
